The '''''Moondrake''''' was a salvaged [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] [[Light freighter/Legends|light]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] owned and operated by the [[Sareeta]]n [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Sassan Sareeta]]. The ''Moondrake'' was a heavily armored craft that Sassan constructed from the hulks of three different YT-1300s that he had acquired. The ship also had a reputation as a blockade runner.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-11-XX -->{{JournalCite|8|The Yard of Opportunity}} {{1st}}
